findings.message: _setup_ci still creates deltaspec/changes/ directories which are dead scaffolding after Phase Z removal. step_check() no longer validates DeltaSpec state.
test_propose_includes_direct_skip_steps and test_mode_unset_does_not_apply_direct_skip iterate over DIRECT_SKIP_STEPS which is now frozenset(). Tests pass vacuously.
test_deltaspec_dirs_not_created_when_deltaspec_absent is stale after Phase Z removal - that code path was removed.
setup chain description still mentions worktree-create which was removed from chain steps.
DIRECT_SKIP_STEPS = frozenset() is intentional but undocumented. Could confuse future readers.
